## Description
What does this PR change, and why?

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (patch)
- [ ] New feature (minor)
- [ ] Breaking change (major)
- [ ] Docs / chore

## Checklist
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (Keep a Changelog format)
- [ ] Version string bumped in `index.html` footer
- [ ] No new third-party / CDN requests
- [ ] Tested locally over HTTP
- [ ] GitHub release cut if this is a major/minor bump

Closes #
